title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Oracle India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Oracle India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Oracle India in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Oracle India:
Oracle India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India!
